overview: The Verdant Resort is a complete luxury resort website featuring a home page with hero, rooms showcase, amenities, gallery, and testimonials. Includes a rooms listing with filters, individual room detail pages with a sticky booking card, an about page with team and awards, and a contact page with an inquiry form.
features: Centralized CSS variable theme system controlling all colors, fonts, and spacing
5 full pages: Home, About, Contact, Rooms listing, Room detail
Sticky navbar with scroll-triggered background and mobile hamburger menu
Hero section with full viewport image, animated scroll indicator
Room cards with filter bar and animated transitions
Sticky booking card with date pickers, guest counter, and price calculator
Policies accordion on room detail pages
Gallery section with hover zoom effects
